data.title: Monad Testnet Sees Significant Increase in Address Count
data.description: According to Foresight News, on-chain data reveals that the Monad testnet has reached a total of 73,433,692 addresses. In the past 24 hours, the network has added 3,605,685 new addresses.

data.title: Justin Sun: TRON will continue to work with WLFI to promote the adoption of cryptocurrency
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Zach Witkoff, co-founder of the Trump family's crypto project World Liberty Financial (WLFI), said in an interview recently that he would work with TRON to promote the adoption of cryptocurrencies. In response, Sun Yuchen, founder of TRON and member of the Huobi HTX Global Advisory Committee, reposted on the X platform, saying that he was pleased to see Zach Witkoff's emphasis on the importance of stablecoins and his sense of mission to integrate them into the American business sector. Sun Yuchen said, "TRON will continue to work with WLFI to promote the adoption of cryptocurrencies - as we do globally - to provide infrastructure that enables millions of people every day to use blockchain technology, enable p2p transactions and seamlessly access the world's reserve currency, the US dollar."

data.title: Bitcoin Shows Bear Trap, ‘$1 Million BTC’ Samson Mow Claims
data.description:
Bitcoin proponent Mow explains what is happening to BTC at the moment
source: https://u.today/bitcoin-shows-bear-trap-1-million-btc-samson-mow-claims

data.title: Solana Network Addresses Reach Record High
data.description: According to Odaily, blockchain analyst Ali reported on X that the number of addresses on the Solana network has surged to approximately 11.12 million, marking a new all-time high.

data.title: In the past 7 days, the cumulative net outflow of CEX was 40,167.27 BTC, which may indicate that traders are hoarding BTC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Coinglass data, in the past 7 days, CEX has accumulated a net outflow of 40,167.27 BTC, of ​​which the top three CEXs are as follows: Bitfinex outflow of 19,599.97 BTC; Binance outflow of 10,813.43 BTC; Coinbase Pro outflow of 8,808.65 BTC. This may indicate that traders are hoarding BTC.

data.title: Solana network addresses reach nearly 11.12 million, a record high
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: On-chain analyst Ali Yu X wrote that the number of Solana network addresses has risen to approximately 11.12 million (11.118 million), a record high.

data.title: Will Brazil Be the Next Country to Embrace Bitcoin Reserves?
data.description:
To support this vision, Congress is already reviewing an active bill that would allocate 5% of Brazil’s national reserves to Bitcoin, signaling a major shift toward crypto adoption. If passed, this move could position Brazil as a leader in integrating …
source: https://coinpedia.org/crypto-live-news/will-brazil-be-the-next-country-to-embrace-bitcoin-reserves/

data.title: Jupiter: Jupuary airdrop appeal deadline approaches
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Jupiter Exchange officially reminds that users marked as Sybil or Bot need to complete the Jupuary airdrop appeal before 23:59 UTC on March 31. This is the final deadline, and the team will review and process valid appeals before the end of May. Previously, Jupiter stated that it would use zk proof to verify user identity to protect privacy and screen real users. The appeal portal is open, please act as soon as possible.

data.title: Earthquake Tragedy Sparks Crypto Relief as CZ Donates $300K in BNB
data.description:
Binance co-founder CZ donates 500 BNB to Thailand and Myanmar following a 7. 7 magnitude earthquake.

The post Earthquake Tragedy Sparks Crypto Relief as CZ Donates $300K in BNB first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/03/29/cz-donates-to-earthquake-relief/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=cz-donates-to-earthquake-relief

data.title: Peter Brandt Predicts XRP Could Drop to $1.07 Unless It Hits $3
data.description:
The post Peter Brandt Predicts XRP Could Drop to $1. This is a bearish pattern usually that signals an imminent downtrend. He suggests that the price will drop, potentially reaching its lowest point from November 2024, unless the coin makes a strong recovery
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/peter-brandt-predicts-xrp-could-drop-to-1-07-unless-it-hits-3/
